files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.AssemblyVersions
files.Summary: Helper methods for inspecting the version of an SDK assembly.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Concurrent.AtomicBoolean
files.Summary: A simple atomic boolean using Interlocked.Exchange.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Concurrent.StateMonitor<StateT, UpdateT>
files.Summary: A generic mechanism for maintaining some kind of synchronized state that multiple tasks or threads can wait on.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.DefaultEventSender
files.Summary: The default implementation of delivering JSON data to an LaunchDarkly event endpoint.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.DiagnosticConfigProperties
files.Summary: Helpers for standard properties we include in diagnostic event configuration data, ensuring that their names and types are consistent across SDKs. It is up to each SDK to call these with values from its own Configuration type. Properties that only exist in server-side or in client-side are not included.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.DiagnosticEvent
files.Summary: Represents a unit of JSON data that will be sent as a diagnostic event. This is simply a wrapper for an immutable and non-nullable , but using the DiagnosticEvent type makes it clearer what the purpose of the data is.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.DiagnosticStoreBase
files.Summary: Abstract implementation of IDiagnosticStore.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventProcessor
files.Summary: The internal component that processes and delivers analytics events.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventTypes.CustomEvent
files.Summary: Parameters for EventProcessor.RecordCustomEvent(UnixMillisecondTime, User, string, LdValue, double?).

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventTypes.EvaluationEvent
files.Summary: Parameters for EventProcessor.RecordEvaluationEvent(EvaluationEvent). Note that the "kind" string identifying this type of event in JSON data is "feature", not "evaluation".

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventTypes.IdentifyEvent
files.Summary: Parameters for EventProcessor.RecordIdentifyEvent(IdentifyEvent).

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventTypes.MigrationOpEvent
files.Summary: Parameters for

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventTypes
files.Summary: This class contains inner types that are used as parameter types for the EventProcessor methods for recording different kinds of events.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.EventsConfiguration
files.Summary: Internal configuration properties for the events system.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.IContextDeduplicator
files.Summary: Interface for a strategy for removing duplicate contexts from the event stream. This has been factored out of because the client-side and server-side clients behave differently (client-side does not send index events).

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.IDiagnosticDisabler
files.Summary: An interface provided to DefaultEventProcessor to indicate when the sending of diagnostic events should be disabled. This is used for mobile platforms to disable diagnostic events when the application is in the background.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.IDiagnosticStore
files.Summary: This interface is for providing to the DefaultEventProcessor and StreamManager. It is responsible for providing diagnostic data specific to the platform implementation for the DefaultEventManager to send to LaunchDarkly. Periodic diagnostic events include data collected during operation (stream initializations and counters) that the IDiagnosticStore implementation stores until CreateEventAndReset is called to retrieve a full event including the collected data and diagnostic session identifier.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.IEventSender
files.Summary: An abstraction of the mechanism for sending event JSON data.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Events.Sampler
files.Summary: Class used for event sampling.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.HashCodeBuilder
files.Summary: Helper type for building implementations of object.GetHashCode().

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Http.HttpErrors
files.Summary: Helper methods to provide standardized HTTP error-handling behavior in the SDKs.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.Http.HttpProperties
files.Summary: Internal representation of HTTP options that are supported by both .NET and Xamarin SDKs, including the logic for constructing the standard set of headers for HTTP requests.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.JsonConverterHelpers.ArrayHelper
files.Summary: A helper for reading JSON arrays.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.JsonConverterHelpers.ObjectHelper
files.Summary: A helper for reading JSON objects. Note that this implementation always returns the property name as a string. If you require very high efficiency and don't want to allocate strings for property names, use the lower-level methods instead.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.JsonConverterHelpers
files.Summary: Helper methods for using the System.Text.Json API more conveniently in custom converters.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.TaskExecutor
files.Summary: Abstraction of scheduling infrequent worker tasks.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Internal.UriExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for URIs.
